title: Unilateral morning glory disc anomaly in a patient with prenatal Zika virus exposure.
ehr_evidence: None. The study is a clinical case report.
summary: A case report describing a 3-year-old male child with unilateral morning glory disc anomaly (MGDA) following prenatal Zika virus (ZIKV) exposure.
key_findings: First report to suggest an association between prenatal ZIKV exposure and MGDA.
Prenatal ZIKV exposure may be associated with a wider pathologic spectrum than previously reported.
data_availability_statement: All data generated or analyzed during this study are included in this manuscript.
